title: Simplify comments area with one, single comment thread
excerpt: Several people on my team agree that multi-threaded comments add unnecessary confusion to the comments area. My feature request is for single-threaded comments as explained here: Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Soft…

posts.author: hughmacken (Hugh M.)
posts.cookedHtml: Several people on my team agree that multi-threaded comments add unnecessary confusion to the comments area. My feature request is for single-threaded comments as explained here: Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

posts.author: lcardenas (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to upvote this request since an integration that I’m using with Monday.com does not support threaded replies. However, I can understand that not all people may want this behavior so it would be great if Administrators could control this at a space or board level rather than a global setting.
